tools.name: chat
tools.description: Send a chat completion request to the confidential LLM. Returns reproducible AI inference results with full attestation metadata including model, quantization, seed, and TEE environment details.

messages.description: JSON array of message objects with role and content fields

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible output. If omitted, the proxy picks a random seed and returns it in the reproducibility block so the response can be replayed.

tools.name: complete
tools.description: Send a text completion request to the confidential LLM. Completes a given prompt with reproducible inference metadata.

tools.name: embed
tools.description: Compute embeddings with the confidential embedding model (OpenAI-compatible /v1/embeddings). The caller formats query vs document prompts; the enclave just embeds. Metered per input token under the embedding model's own resource.

input.description: Text to embed, or a JSON array of texts for a batch

dimensions.description: Optional output dimensionality (Matryoshka truncation; the model's native width when omitted)

tools.name: rerank
tools.description: Score documents against a query with the confidential reranker (/v1/rerank). Served as sequence classification; the relevance score is the yes-logit. Metered per input token.

documents.description: JSON array of candidate document texts to score

top_n.description: Return only the N highest-scoring documents

tools.name: served_models
tools.description: The attested serving manifest: build identity plus every served model (task, canonical id, dm-verity digest, state). Dependant enclaves (e.g. Privasys Drive) fetch this over RA-TLS to pin the fleet in their attested-dependency set.

tools.name: models
tools.description: List available models on this confidential AI instance.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Check the health status and reproducibility configuration of this confidential AI instance. Returns model, quantization, TEE type, and image digest.

tools.name: unload_model
tools.description: Unload the current model and stop vLLM. Frees GPU memory so a different model can be loaded.

tools.name: model_status
tools.description: Check model loading status. Returns state (idle, loading, ready, failed), progress, elapsed time, and error details.

tools.name: readiness
tools.description: Check if the instance is ready to serve inference requests. Returns 200 when a model is loaded, 503 otherwise.

configure.name: load_model
configure.title: Models & vLLM settings
configure.description: Load the models this instance serves: the chat LLM, plus optional embedding and reranker sidecars on the same GPU. The instance becomes ready only when ALL configured models are loaded (the main model first, ~15 min cold; the small models load in seconds - follow per-model progress with the model_status action).

model.description: The chat model this instance serves. The list is the models available on this instance.

embedding_model.description: Optional embedding model served behind /v1/embeddings (own vLLM instance, ~5% GPU memory). Leave blank to serve none.

rerank_model.description: Optional reranker served behind /v1/rerank (own vLLM instance, ~5% GPU memory). Leave blank to serve none.

dtype.description: Weight data type: auto, bfloat16, float16, float32.

quantization.description: Quantization method (awq, gptq, int4, ...). Leave blank for none.

max_num_seqs.description: vLLM --max-num-seqs cap. Lower for very long contexts so the KV cache fits (e.g. 4 for 256k on H100 80GB).

gpu_memory_utilization.description: GPU memory utilization for the chat model (0.0-1.0). 0.82 leaves room for the embedding + reranker sidecars (~0.08 each: vLLM's KV floor for one 32k sequence is 3.5 GiB per pooling instance).

enable_chunked_prefill.description: Chunked prefill with a bounded token budget. Required for long contexts (>=128k): single-block prefill reserves activations proportional to the context length and wastes 15-25 GiB.

enable_prefix_caching.description: vLLM automatic prefix caching. Reuse is partitioned per caller (server-derived cache_salt) and every response discloses its hits (reproducibility.cached_tokens); strict-replay callers bypass it per request. Experimental on hybrid Mamba models (hits only on completed ~528-token blocks).

max_num_batched_tokens.description: vLLM --max-num-batched-tokens. 32768 is the production 262k recipe with chunked prefill on.

kv_cache_dtype.description: KV cache data type. fp8 halves the attention KV footprint (part of the attested config; changes outputs vs fp16 KV).
